Some women have polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), a treatable condition that involves a hormone imbalance.
Women who have polycystic ovarian syndrome may have many small cysts at one time.
Endocrine disorders like thyroid disease can cause irregular periods, too, as can polycystic ovary disease, a hormonal glitch that may lead to obesity, acne, and excessive hair growth.
